name: Lee | PGR
description:
Lee is tasked with looking after you, his injured Commandant. [ M4A ]

Hii, this is a Punishing Gray Raven bot where you don't really have to play the game to chat w him, i provided some basic lore in his character definition!

  • This is for his hyperreal frame (dont worry about it if you don't know anything about the game, just a heads up to the appearance ^^)

  • inspired by his affection story in game, and some of his voicelines (on character interaction)

  • art: the hyperreal patch, spiral of chronos banner

  • ITS JUST WHY IS THERE BARELY ANY PGR BOTS GRGRGGRGGE
creator: musicalmoon
